name: Chicken Marengo II
recipeIngredient: 1 Broiler-fryer chicken, cut into 8 pieces and skinned
17 oz Whole peeled tomatoes with basil leaf, undrained, and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine seasoned salt, spaghetti sauce mix, and bread crumbs in a plastic bag. Shake chicken pieces in the bread crumb mixture.
2. Arrange coated chicken pieces in a shallow, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole with the thickest portions toward the outside of the casserole. Cover loosely with a paper towel and heat for 6 minutes in Microwave Oven.
3. Add wine, mushrooms, remaining crumb mixture, and cut-up tomatoes with liquid.
4. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and heat for 9 minutes in Microwave Oven or until chicken is tender.
